results.title: Next On Pages
results.description: A CLI tool to build, develop, and deploy Next.js applications for the Cloudflare Pages platform, enhancing the developer experience with an ESLint plugin and development submodule.

results.title: Cloudflare Pages
results.description: Cloudflare Pages allows developers to create and deploy full-stack applications instantly to the Cloudflare global network, supporting deployment via Git, direct upload, or C3 CLI.

results.title: Cloudflare Pages Action
results.description: A GitHub Action for creating Cloudflare Pages deployments using the Direct Upload feature and Wrangler CLI integration.

results.title: Astro Cloudflare Pages Headers
results.description: A lightweight Astro integration that automatically generates a Cloudflare Pages _headers file from your server header configuration in astro.config.mjs.

results.title: Open Next.js Cloudflare
results.description: Open Next.js adapter for Cloudflare

results.title: Cloudflare
results.description: Cloudflare Docs is an open-source documentation project that allows community feedback and contributions to maintain high-quality documentation for Cloudflare services.

results.title: Cloudflare
results.description: A Ruby wrapper for the Cloudflare V4 API that provides lightweight access to zones, DNS records, and firewall rules management.

results.title: gh-pages
results.description: A Node.js module to publish files to a `gh-pages` branch on GitHub (or any other branch anywhere else) by creating a temporary clone, copying files, committing changes, and pushing to a remote.

results.title: EdgeOne Pages
results.description: EdgeOne Pages is a full-stack development and deployment platform built on Tencent EdgeOne infrastructure, providing a serverless deployment experience for frontend pages and dynamic APIs, suitable for modern web projects like marketing sites and AI applications, ensuring fast and stable access through global edge network acceleration.

results.title: Pages CMS
results.description: The No-Hassle CMS for Static Sites Generators

results.title: Cloudflare Workers
results.description: Cloudflare Workers is a serverless platform that allows developers to run JavaScript, WebAssembly, and other code directly on Cloudflare's global network.

results.title: Pages CMS
results.description: Pages CMS is an open-source Content Management System for static websites, enabling users to edit content directly on GitHub through a user-friendly interface.

results.title: Cloudflare Agents
results.description: Cloudflare Agents provides a framework for building intelligent, stateful AI agents that persist, think, and evolve at the edge of the network, supporting real-time communication and autonomous operation.

results.title: Cloudflare Containers
results.description: A class for interacting with Containers on Cloudflare Workers, offering features like HTTP request proxying, WebSocket forwarding, and lifecycle management.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js enables you to create full-stack web applications by extending the latest React features and integrating powerful Rust-based JavaScript tooling for the fastest builds.

results.title: Cloudflare Agents
results.description: The Cloudflare Agents SDK enables building and deploying AI-powered agents that autonomously perform tasks, communicate in real time, call AI models, persist state, schedule tasks, and run asynchronous workflows.

results.title: Struct Pages
results.description: Struct Pages is a Go library that enables struct-based routing for web applications, integrating with `http.ServeMux` to simplify web development with features like Templ support, HTMX integration, and type-safe URLs.

results.title: Cloudflare Workflows
results.description: Cloudflare Workflows is a durable execution engine built on Cloudflare Workers, enabling the creation of multi-step applications that can automatically retry, persist state, and run for extended periods. It simplifies building reliable, long-running tasks and observing their progress.

results.title: Linux man-pages
results.description: Linux man-pages is a comprehensive collection of manual pages documenting Linux kernel interfaces, system calls, library functions, and command-line utilities.

results.title: Cloudflare Workers
results.description: The Cloudflare Workers SDK provides tools and libraries for deploying serverless code globally, enabling exceptional performance, reliability, and scale across the Cloudflare network.

results.title: Cloudflare AI
results.description: This monorepo contains packages and demo applications for consuming Cloudflare's AI offerings on the client-side, including providers for Vercel AI SDK.

results.title: Nuxt Pages Plus
results.description: A Nuxt module that enables complex routing for Nuxt Pages, providing features like parallel and modal routes, file-based routing, and SSR support.

results.title: Cloudflare Turnstile
results.description: Cloudflare Turnstile is a smart CAPTCHA alternative that can be embedded into any website without sending traffic through Cloudflare and works without showing visitors a CAPTCHA. It adapts challenge difficulty to individual visitors using non-interactive JavaScript challenges and machine learning models.

results.title: Cloudflare Queues
results.description: Cloudflare Queues is a messaging service that integrates with Cloudflare Workers to enable guaranteed message delivery, offload work, and buffer data without egress bandwidth charges.

results.title: Cloudflare R2
results.description: Cloudflare R2 is an object storage service that allows developers to store large amounts of unstructured data without costly egress bandwidth fees.

results.title: Cloudflare Provider
results.description: The Cloudflare resource provider for Pulumi allows users to manage Cloudflare resources programmatically using various programming languages.

results.title: Cloudflare Playwright
results.description: A fork of Playwright modified for compatibility with Cloudflare Workers and Browser Rendering, enabling browser automation within the Cloudflare ecosystem.

results.title: Vite Plugin Pages
results.description: Vite Plugin Pages provides file system based routing for Vue 3, React, and Solid applications using Vite, simplifying route generation from file structures.

results.title: Cloudflare Go
results.description: A Go library providing convenient access to the Cloudflare REST API, generated with Stainless, for applications written in Go.
